    BatchOperation
    An operation created as a result of a call to RodinCore.run(IWorkspaceRunnable, IProgressMonitor) that encapsulates a user defined IWorkspaceRunnable.
    Buffer
    Implements a Rodin file loaded into memory.
    Buffer.XMLErrorHandler
     
    Buffer.XMLErrorListener
     
    BufferCache
    Implements a cache of Rodin file buffers.
    ChangeElementAttributeOperation
     
    ClearElementsOperation
    This operation clears a collection of elements.
    ContributedElementType<T extends IRodinElement>
    Base class for contributed element types.
    ContributedItemTypes<T extends IContributedItemType>
    Stores a map between ids and some Rodin item types contributed through an extension point.
    CopyElementsOperation
    This operation copies/moves a collection of elements from their current container to a new container, optionally renaming the elements.
    CopyResourceElementsOperation
    This operation copies/moves/renames a collection of resources from their current container to a new container, optionally renaming the elements.
    CreateFreshInternalElementOperation<T extends IInternalElement>
     
    CreateInternalElementOperation
     
    CreateProblemMarkerOperation
    Creation of a problem marker on a Rodin element.
    CreateRodinFileOperation
    This operation creates a Rodin file.
    DBUpdater
    This class is used by RodinDBManager to update the RodinDB based on some IRodinElementDeltas.
    DeleteElementsOperation
    This operation deletes a collection of elements (and all of their children).
    DeleteResourceElementsOperation
    This operation deletes a collection of resources and all of their children.
    DeltaProcessingState
    Keep the global states used during Rodin element delta processing.
    DeltaProcessor
    This class is used by RodinDBManager to convert IResourceDeltas into IRodinElementDeltas.
    DOMProvider
    Helper class for accessing to the DOM implementation in the Java library.
    ElementComparer
    Common implementation for comparing internal parents.
    ElementComparer.SameAttributesComparer
     
    ElementComparer.SameChildrenComparer
     
    ElementComparer.SameContentsComparer
     
    ElementType<T extends IRodinElement>
    Base class for all element types (predefined or contributed).
    ElementType.DatabaseElementType
     
    ElementType.FileElementType
     
    ElementType.ProjectElementType
     
    ElementTypeManager
    Manager for Rodin element types.
    ElementTypeRegistry
    A registry class to store element types.
    FileAssociation
     
    FileAssociations
    Stores a map between content type name and file associations, as defined by the extension point fileAssociations.
    IContributedItemType
    Common protocol for Rodin item types (internal element and attribute) contributed through an extension point.
    InternalElementInfo
     
    InternalElementType<T extends IInternalElement>
     
    InternalElementTypes
    Stores a map between ids and internal element types, as defined by the extension point internalElementTypes.
    LRUCacheEnumerator<V>
    The LRUCacheEnumerator returns its elements in the order they are found in the LRUCache, with the most recent elements first.
    LRUCacheEnumerator.LRUEnumeratorElement<VI>
     
    MoveElementsOperation
    This operation moves internal elements from their current container to a specified destination container, optionally renaming the elements.
    MoveResourceElementsOperation
    This operation moves resources (Rodin files) from their current container to a specified destination container, optionally renaming the elements.
    MultiOperation
    This class is used to perform operations on multiple IRodinElement.
    NameGenerator
    Utility class for generating unique names for database elements.
    Openable
    Abstract class for implementations of Rodin elements which are IOpenable.
    OpenableCache
    An LRU cache of Openables.
    OpenableElementInfo
    Element info for IOpenable elements.
    OverflowingLRUCache<K,V>
    The OverflowingLRUCache is an LRUCache which attempts to maintain a size equal or less than its fSpaceLimit by removing the least recently used elements.

    This operation renames elements.
    RenameResourceElementsOperation
    This operation renames resources (Rodin files).

    Shortcut class to use instead of the long fully parameterized HashMap.

    This operation saves the contents of a Rodin file to its underlying resource.
